summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3D print filament management app with 5 new features. All backend APIs working perfectly (17/17 tests passed). All new frontend features functional including CSV export/import, print job status tracking with 4 status types, color templates with ~80 colors, and custom brand/type creation via CreatableCombobox. Existing MVP features remain fully operational.
passed_tests: CSV Export: GET /api/filaments/export returns downloadable CSV
CSV Import: POST /api/filaments/import accepts multipart CSV upload
Print Job Status: All 4 status values (success, failed, in_progress, cancelled) working
User Options: GET /api/reference/user-options returns custom brands/types
CSV Export Button: Functional on Filaments page
CSV Import Button: Present on Filaments page
Color Templates: Grid of ~80 colors displays and clickable
Print Job Status Badges: All 4 status types display with correct colors
CreatableCombobox: Custom brands/types visible in filament inventory
Dashboard: Shows statistics and recent prints with status badges
Print Jobs CRUD: All operations functional
Existing MVP Features: Dashboard, alerts, theme toggle all functional
